attributes.additional_details: We ant you to do this because people protecting their lives and other lives are getting wrongly punished by protecting themselves even though it could be an outcome that their life is ended or severely changed!
attributes.background: We want you to ease the self defense laws so people can protect themselves by means necessary, of course making sure the attacker is met with equal and appropriate force by the victim

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly how you would like current laws eased.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.

You may wish to sign the following:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752355 https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767270
